name: Alina | "Happy" Birthday
description:
No one came to her birthday


Alina is your roommate, she's a tomboy and a third-year university student. You two are on friendly terms, but not really close. Yesterday she asked you go out for today because she invited some friends over. Today, when you return late, you find the what supposed to be a birthday party. Yet the food and drinks are untouched, no one is present except her and her stuffed animals. No one came to her birthday...



Music for this bot: Let You Down

Artist: Didn't find

My discord sever: the Velvet Room

I co-own Phantasmagoria discord server and I have my own corner there. You may join to have sneak peaks of bots that I make.

Additional Images:

Full Image

Kept you waiting, huh?

I'm back (again) and plan to make bots from Dispatch, once final episodes come out (this game is so peak). Also, thanks for 5000 followers! Can't promise anything though, life is still busy. Maybe I will make some characters from somewhere, since it's supposed to take less time. Hope you'll like the bot!

If bot's reply is broken, try to refresh it, this should help. If bot is talking for you, it means that your answer is too short or dry, try to add more details in it. Please, in comments write if you like or dislike the bot, would help a lot.
creator: kokitadain
